description_long: This is a large, rugged monster truck designed for extreme off-road and urban obstacle performance. The body is heavily weathered, featuring a mix of green and brown paint with significant mud splatter and wear, suggesting frequent use in harsh environments. The vehicle sits atop four oversized, deeply treaded tires, each mounted on robust axles with visible heavy-duty suspension components. The chassis is exposed, revealing a reinforced frame and shock absorbers, while the cab is compact and reinforced, likely with a roll cage for safety. An antenna extends from the rear, and the windows are either missing or heavily tinted, adding to the aggressive, utilitarian appearance. The overall build emphasizes durability, power, and the ability to traverse rough terrain or urban debris.
description: A weathered, mud-splattered monster truck with oversized, knobby tires and a reinforced, exposed chassis. Its rugged build and heavy-duty suspension make it ideal for extreme off-road or urban obstacle use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, the exposed suspension, and the large, deeply treaded tires.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide stance, aggressive tire tread, and the compact, reinforced cab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, revealing more of the green paint and mud splatter, as well as the rear suspension details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the cab, the antenna, and the massive rear tires with visible tread.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern with deep grooves, optimized for maximum traction on loose, muddy, or uneven terrain.
